description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.45.0

You can now create printable "shop cards" that summarize your business information.

• 🪪 Generate printable shop cards — Choose from 4 formats: L-size (portrait or landscape), folded tent card, or business card size. Download or share cards as images that include your shop name, address, business hours, contact info, and QR code.

• Choose a logo to display on your card — Select from logo options found on the official website, or enter a URL manually. You can also choose a layout without a logo.

• Add phone, email, and fax to contact info — In addition to official website and SNS links, you can now register and display phone numbers, email addresses, and fax numbers.

• Official website and phone from Google automatically appear — Your business page and cards will automatically show the official website and phone number stored in Google (if you register different information yourself, your entry takes priority).

• Fixed a bug where "No one has registered yet" would sometimes appear incorrectly while the shop list was loading.
